title: astragalus nigritus
intro: Astragalus nigritus, also known as Huang Qi, is a perennial plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Astragalus nigritus include enhanced immune function, reduced stress and fatigue, improved digestion, and enhanced antioxidant defenses. Astragalus nigritus is commonly used in herbal preparations such as tea, capsules, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to support overall health and well-being.
